# Chart example with mixed values (note screen space usage in case when ABS
OLUTE values of negative and positive parts are differ too much)

  2                    5          7
                                  ██
                                  ██
                       ██         ██
                       ██         ██
  ██                   ██         ██
         ██     ██
         ██
         -3     -2
Bar 1  Bar 2  Bar 3  Bar 4  Longer Label


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
